creator: shurd@FreeBSD.org
text:
edwin@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: New port: devel/codeblocks-devel SVN version of Code::Blocks (Current and less buggy than devel/codeblocks)
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: edwin
>   

> No theme index file in '/usr/local/share/icons/gnome'.
> If you really want to create an icon cache here, use --ignore-theme-index.
> gmake[5]: *** [install-data-hook] Error 1
> gmake[5]: Leaving directory `/var/ports/usr/ports/NEW/codeblocks-devel/work/trunk/src/setup/mime'
>
> Any suggestions?
>   

Unfortunately, I have effectively zero time to dedicate to fixing this, 
so the only real suggestion I have at this point is changing to a newer 
revision and trying again and reporting to the codeblocks folks.


Hopefully my schedule will open up again in a couple weeks.
